project: VCP Scanner — Fix Production Data Display

stories.title: Fix PWA service worker caching stale API responses
acceptanceCriteria: web/vite.config.ts removes /api/.* runtime caching rule from workbox config
web/vite.config.ts adds skipWaiting: true and clientsClaim: true to workbox config
Built sw.js contains skipWaiting/clientsClaim and has zero references to api-cache
Production sw.js at vcp-scanner.pages.dev/sw.js contains skipWaiting

stories.title: Fix frontend API URL to point directly to Worker
acceptanceCriteria: Production JS at vcp-scanner.pages.dev contains Worker URL
Worker API returns data: /api/alerts has total > 0, /api/portfolio returns portfolio object

stories.title: Verify production deployment works end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: curl vcp-scanner.pages.dev loads HTML with correct JS asset reference
Worker API /api/alerts returns JSON with total >= 0 (not HTML)
Worker API /api/portfolio returns JSON with portfolio object
